data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence regarding the hold lifecycle.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm the implementation of the hold lifecycle (active, released, consumed, expired, cancelled) as required. While the linked use case outlines the need for this lifecycle, it lacks concrete evidence of its existence or functionality. Therefore, the validation step cannot be completed, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of hold lifecycle implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the hold lifecycle.
